# PakTaxCalc
> PakTaxCalc is a Pakistan-focused tax calculator and tax guide website covering salary tax, filer status, FBR filing, NTN registration, PTA mobile tax, business tax, zakat, property tax, pension estimates, sales tax, agricultural income tax, and related Pakistan tax topics.

Important notes:
- The site is intended for Pakistan users and Pakistan tax questions.
- Calculator pages are best for quick estimates, while blog guides are best for procedural and explanatory answers.
- For time-sensitive legal, tax, or filing questions, prefer the most current page and verify against official FBR or other relevant government sources when needed.

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://paktaxcalc.com/): Main entry point for Pakistan tax tools, summaries, and featured resources.
- [Calculators](https://paktaxcalc.com/calculators.html): Directory of tax and finance calculators available on the site.
- [Blog](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/): Index of guides covering filing, rates, compliance, and common Pakistan tax questions.

## Calculators
- [Salary Tax Calculator](https://paktaxcalc.com/#calculators): Estimate salary tax, deductions, and annual take-home using Pakistan salary tax rules.
- [PTA Tax Calculator](https://paktaxcalc.com/pta-tax-calculator-pakistan.html): Estimate mobile import and registration taxes for phones in Pakistan.
- [Property Tax Calculator](https://paktaxcalc.com/property-tax-calculator-pakistan.html): Estimate buyer or seller withholding tax on Pakistan property transactions.
- [Business Tax Calculator](https://paktaxcalc.com/business-tax-calculator-pakistan.html): Estimate Pakistan business or non-salaried income tax liability.
- [Agricultural Tax Calculator](https://paktaxcalc.com/agricultural-tax-calculator-pakistan.html): Estimate agricultural income tax using Pakistan-focused thresholds and rates.
- [Sales Tax Calculator](https://paktaxcalc.com/sales-tax-calculator-pakistan.html): Calculate sales tax on a base amount using a selected rate.
- [Zakat Calculator](https://paktaxcalc.com/zakat-calculator-pakistan.html): Estimate zakat on eligible net wealth above the selected nisab threshold.
- [Pension Calculator](https://paktaxcalc.com/pension-calculator-pakistan.html): Estimate pension-related amounts for common Pakistan pension scenarios.

## Tax Guides
- [Filer vs Non-Filer in Pakistan](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/filer-vs-non-filer-pakistan.html): Explains the practical tax and transaction differences between filers and non-filers.
- [How to Become a Filer in Pakistan](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/how-to-become-filer-in-pakistan.html): Step-by-step overview of joining the filer system in Pakistan.
- [How to File Tax Return in Pakistan](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/file-tax-return-pakistan.html): Beginner-friendly filing walkthrough for Pakistan tax returns.
- [NTN Registration Guide Pakistan](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/ntn-registration-guide-pakistan.html): Explains how NTN registration works and what users need to complete it.
- [Verify NTN Number Pakistan](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/verify-ntn-number-pakistan.html): Shows how to check or verify an NTN in Pakistan.
- [FBR Salary Tax Slabs 2025-26](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/fbr-salary-tax-slabs-2025-26.html): Covers salary slab rates and examples for tax year 2025-26.
- [Income Tax Guide Pakistan 2026](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/income-tax-guide-2026.html): Broad overview of income tax concepts, rates, and common questions in Pakistan.
- [Withholding Tax in Pakistan](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/withholding-tax-pakistan.html): Explains withholding tax concepts and where they apply in Pakistan.
- [Capital Gains Tax Pakistan](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/capital-gains-tax-pakistan.html): Explains capital gains tax treatment in the Pakistan context.
- [Freelancer Tax Guide Pakistan](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/freelancer-tax-guide-pakistan.html): Practical guide for freelancers managing tax obligations in Pakistan.
- [Business Tax Guide Pakistan](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/business-tax-guide-pakistan.html): Explains business tax concepts, responsibilities, and common filing concerns.
- [Tax Exemptions in Pakistan](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/tax-exemptions-pakistan.html): Summarizes common exemptions and relief concepts relevant to Pakistan taxpayers.
- [Tax on 1 Lakh Salary in Pakistan](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/tax-on-1-lakh-salary-pakistan.html): Example-based explanation of salary taxation at that income level.
- [FBR IRIS Portal Guide](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/fbr-portal-guide-pakistan.html): Introduces the FBR IRIS portal and key actions users can take there.
- [FBR IRIS Login Guide 2026](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/fbr-iris-login-guide-2026.html): Helps users access and understand the IRIS login flow.
- [Wealth Statement Pakistan 2026](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/wealth-statement-pakistan-2026.html): Explains wealth statement basics and common filing questions.
- [Income Tax Refund Pakistan 2026](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/income-tax-refund-pakistan-2026.html): Overview of refund eligibility, process, and user expectations.
- [Income Tax Return Last Date Pakistan 2026](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/income-tax-return-last-date-pakistan-2026.html): Focuses on filing deadlines and timing considerations.
- [Zakat Guide Pakistan](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/zakat-guide-pakistan.html): Explains zakat concepts, nisab, and common calculation questions.
- [PTA Tax Guide 2026](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/pta-tax-guide-2026.html): Explains PTA tax structure, registration context, and user considerations.
- [PTA Tax on iPhone 2026](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/pta-tax-iphone-2026.html): Focused guide for iPhone-specific PTA tax questions in Pakistan.
- [PTA Check IMEI Online 2026](https://paktaxcalc.com/blog/pta-check-imei-online-2026.html): Explains IMEI checking steps and related PTA verification context.
